docs.title: 🎯 Career Objective
docs.text: To become a skilled AI & Cloud Engineer by continuously learning modern technologies, contributing to open-source projects, and building innovative automation solutions.

docs.title: Welcome!
docs.text:
Hello! I am Nijeswin C S, a Computer Science and Engineering student specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning at K.S.R College of Technology.

I am passionate about AI, Cloud Computing, Open Source, and Workflow Automation. During my internship at iGradAI Labs Private Limited, I gained practical experience by working on real-world projects.

docs.title: 🎓 Conclusion
docs.text: The internship at iGradAI Labs Private Limited was an enriching learning experience.

docs.title: Key Takeaways
docs.text:
• Learned AI Automation
  • Explored Cloud Computing
  • Built workflow automation using n8n
  • Worked with GitHub and GitHub Pages
  • Learned Documentation as Code using MkDocs
  • Gained hands-on experience with AWS Services

This internship strengthened my technical knowledge and improved my problem-solving skills through real-world projects and practical implementation.

docs.title: Thank You
docs.text: Thank you to iGradAI Labs Private Limited and my mentor Santhosh N C for providing this valuable learning opportunity.

docs.title: 📌 Project Overview
docs.text: During my internship at iGradAI Labs Private Limited, I developed an Automated Certificate Generation Workflow using n8n. The workflow automates the process of generating certificates and sending them to recipients, reducing manual effort and improving efficiency.

docs.title: 🎯 Project Objective
docs.text:
The objective of this project was to:

  • Automate certificate generation.
  • Reduce manual work.
  • Improve speed and accuracy.
  • Learn workflow automation using n8n.
  • Integrate different services within a single workflow.

docs.title: 🛠️ Technologies Used
docs.text:
• n8n Workflow Automation
  • GitHub
  • GitHub Pages
  • Google Drive
  • Google Slides
  • Gmail
  • MkDocs

docs.title: 🔄 Workflow
docs.text:
Student Data
      │
      ▼
Generate Certificate
      │
      ▼
Convert to PDF
      │
      ▼
Store in Google Drive
      │
      ▼
Send Email to Student

docs.title: ✨ Features
docs.text:
• ✅ Automatic certificate generation
  • ✅ Workflow automation using n8n
  • ✅ PDF creation
  • ✅ Google Drive integration
  • ✅ Automatic email delivery
  • ✅ Reduced manual effort

docs.title: 💻 Technologies Learned
docs.text:
Throughout my internship at iGradAI Labs Private Limited, I worked with several modern technologies.

# 🔄 n8n Workflow Automation ### Skills Learned - Creating workflows - Trigger Nodes - Action Nodes - API Integration - Data Transformation - Automation # 🐙 Git & GitHub ### Skills Learned - Repository Creation - Git Commands - Branch Management - Version Control - Collaboration # 🌐 GitHub Pages ### Skills Learned - Static Website Hosting - Documentation Deployment - GitHub Pages Configuration # ⚙️ GitHub Actions ### Skills Learned - CI/CD Concepts - Workflow Automation - YAML Configuration # ☁️ AWS Cloud Services ### Services Learned - Amazon EC2 - VPC - Security Groups - Route Tables - Internet Gateway - Application Load Balancer # 📖 Documentation as Code ### Tools Used - MkDocs - Material Theme - Markdown - GitHub Pages

docs.title: 🎯 Outcome
docs.text: During this internship, I strengthened my understanding of cloud computing, automation, documentation, and version control by applying these technologies in practical tasks and projects.
